module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout plus prompt-template sources. It organizes agent, client, common, prompt, host, protocol, and tool crates/modules; agent sessions now run host_disconnect after run_host_worker returns so host/client state, queued tasks, host System metadata, and SessionContext are cleaned up at the end of a host connection lifecycle, while common exposes the cleanup-capable WorkQueue and serializable System, Platform, and Arch configuration types.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt orchestration; it performs host_disconnect cleanup after run_host_worker returns at the end of a host connection lifecycle and stores host System metadata from execution Preview events.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for ClientSession and ClientEvent; it surfaces StepEvent updates/failures/non-streamed completions as client output and closes by dropping the worker handle without joining.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading with serializable System/Platform/Arch re-exports, external adapters, logging, and structure utilities including WorkQueue::clear for session cleanup.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON no-fence requirements and single-string execution invocation input guidance.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: First-class marix-protocol workspace crate for reusable session, task, step, execution, and tool protocol definitions; execution Preview events now carry host System and ToolPreview values via a marix-common dependency.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; executor preview replies now include System::new host metadata and tool previews.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
